name: Nnenna Freelon
abstract: Nnenna Freelon  (born July 28, 1954) is an American jazz singer, composer, producer, and arranger.

about_quotes.speaker: Michael Abene
about_quotes.evidence: I did a record for Nnenna Freelon about three years ago called “Maiden Voyage” for Concord and we used different small groups.
about_quotes.doc_title: Michael Abene interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 11, 2003

about_quotes.speaker: Terri Lyne Carrington
about_quotes.evidence: the people that will be there will be Nnenna Freelon, John Patitucci, Bobby Sanabria and I think Robin Eubanks will get there eventually.
about_quotes.doc_title: Terri Lyne Carrington interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 9, 2003

about_quotes.speaker: Josiah Gluck
about_quotes.evidence: if I’m doing any number of vocalists I’ve worked with like let’s say someone like Nnenna Freelon
about_quotes.doc_title: Josiah Gluck interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 13, 2022
